@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam classFontStyle italic
skinparam classBackgroundColor #F5F5F5
skinparam classBorderColor #333333
skinparam classArrowColor #333333
skinparam classStereotypeStyle none
skinparam classStereotypeFontStyle bold
skinparam classStereotypeFontColor #FFFFFF
skinparam classStereotypeBackgroundColor #6A5ACD
skinparam classStereotypeBorderColor #483D8B
skinparam classStereotypeBorderThickness 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderRadius 10
skinparam classStereotypeBorderPadding 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderMargin 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderSpacing 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderWidth 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderHeight 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderDepth 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderShadow 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderGlow 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderGradient 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderPattern 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTexture 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderImage 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderIcon 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderLabel 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderNote 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderComment 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTag 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderLink 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderRef 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderSource 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTarget 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderDirection 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderOrientation 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderAlignment 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderJustification 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderIndentation 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderSpacing 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderPadding 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderMargin 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderWidth 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderHeight 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderDepth 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderShadow 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderGlow 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderGradient 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderPattern 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTexture 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderImage 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderIcon 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderLabel 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderNote 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderComment 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTag 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderLink 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderRef 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderSource 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTarget 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderDirection 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderOrientation 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderAlignment 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderJustification 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderIndentation 2

interface Vehiculo {
    + marca: string
    + modelo: string
    + velocidadMax: number
    + encender(): void
    + apagar(): void
    + acelerar(): void
    + frenar(): void
}

interface Recargable {
    + autonomia: string
    + cargar(number): void
    + descargar(number): void
}

interface VehiculoRecargable

class BiciElectrica {
    + pedalear(): void
}

class AutoElectrico {
    + manejoAutonomo(): void
}

class MonopatinElectrico {
    + ajustarAltura(): void
    + plegar(): void
}

Vehiculo <|-- VehiculoRecargable
Recargable <|-- VehiculoRecargable
VehiculoRecargable ..|> BiciElectrica
VehiculoRecargable ..|> AutoElectrico
VehiculoRecargable ..|> MonopatinElectrico

@enduml
